Get the top 10 customers by total order amount from the production database

arguments.query: SELECT c.name, SUM(o.amount) as total FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10

input: Count orders from the last 30 days grouped by status

arguments.query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM orders WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY status
